question: How do I reset my password?
answer: To reset your password, go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password'. Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link. The link expires after 24 hours. If you don't receive the email, check your spam folder or contact support.

question: How do I change my email address?
answer: To change your email address, log in to your account, go to Settings > Profile, and click 'Edit' next to your email. You'll need to verify the new email address by clicking the confirmation link we send. Your old email will remain active until the new one is confirmed.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: To delete your account, go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. You'll be asked to confirm by entering your password. Account deletion is permanent and all your data will be removed within 30 days. Any active subscriptions will be cancelled immediately.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
answer: To enable two-factor authentication (2FA), go to Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication and click 'Enable'. You can use an authenticator app like Google Authenticator or Authy. Scan the QR code with your app and enter the verification code to complete setup.

question: How do I update my profile information?
answer: To update your profile, log in and navigate to Settings > Profile. You can edit your name, phone number, address, and profile picture. Click 'Save Changes' when you're done. Some changes may require email verification.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. For business accounts, we also accept bank transfers and invoicing. All payments are processed securely through our PCI-compliant payment provider.

question: How do I update my billing information?
answer: To update your billing information, go to Settings > Billing > Payment Methods. You can add a new card, remove an old one, or set a default payment method. Changes take effect on your next billing cycle.

question: How do I view my invoices?
answer: To view your invoices, go to Settings > Billing > Invoice History. You can download individual invoices as PDF files. Invoices are generated at the end of each billing cycle and are also sent to your registered email address.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: To cancel your subscription, go to Settings > Billing > Subscription and click 'Cancel Subscription'. Your access will continue until the end of the current billing period. You won't be charged again after cancellation. You can resubscribe at any time.

question: What is your refund policy?
answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all plans. If you're not satisfied, contact our support team within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. Refunds are processed within 5-10 business days and returned to your original payment method.

question: How do I apply a promo code?
answer: To apply a promo code, go to Settings > Billing > Subscription and click 'Apply Promo Code'. Enter your code and click 'Apply'. The discount will be reflected on your next invoice. Promo codes cannot be combined and are subject to terms and conditions.

question: What are the system requirements?
answer: Our application works on modern web browsers including Chrome 90+, Firefox 88+, Safari 14+, and Edge 90+. For mobile, we support iOS 14+ and Android 10+. A stable internet connection with at least 1 Mbps is recommended for optimal performance.

question: Why is the app running slowly?
answer: If the app is running slowly, try these steps: 1) Clear your browser cache and cookies. 2) Disable browser extensions that might interfere. 3) Check your internet connection speed. 4) Try using a different browser. 5) If the issue persists, contact support with your browser version and a description of the slowness.

question: How do I clear my cache?
answer: To clear your cache: In Chrome, go to Settings > Privacy > Clear Browsing Data. In Firefox, go to Settings > Privacy > Clear Data. In Safari, go to Preferences > Privacy > Manage Website Data. Select cached files and click Clear/Delete. Then reload the application.

question: I'm getting an error message. What should I do?
answer: If you see an error message: 1) Note the exact error message and any error code. 2) Try refreshing the page. 3) Clear your browser cache. 4) Try a different browser. 5) If the error persists, contact support with the error details, your browser version, and steps to reproduce the issue.

question: Is there an API available?
answer: Yes, we offer a REST API for integration with your existing systems. API documentation is available at docs.example.com/api. You'll need an API key which you can generate from Settings > Developer > API Keys. Rate limits depend on your plan tier.

question: How do I export my data?
answer: To export your data, go to Settings > Account > Data Export. You can export your data in CSV or JSON format. The export includes all your account data, activity history, and settings. Large exports may take a few minutes to generate.

question: How long does standard shipping take?
answer: Standard shipping typically takes 5-7 business days within the continental US. For Alaska and Hawaii, allow 7-10 business days. International standard shipping takes 10-15 business days depending on the destination country and customs processing.

question: Do you offer expedited shipping?
answer: Yes, we offer expedited shipping options: Express (2-3 business days) for $12.99 and Overnight (next business day) for $24.99 within the continental US. Expedited shipping is not available for PO boxes or international addresses.

question: How do I track my order?
answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via email. You can also find tracking information in your account under Orders > Order History. Click on your order number to see real-time tracking updates. Tracking information may take 24 hours to update after shipping.

question: Do you ship internationally?
answer: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries worldwide. International shipping rates and delivery times vary by destination. Import duties and taxes are the responsibility of the recipient. You can see available shipping options and costs at checkout.

question: My order hasn't arrived yet. What should I do?
answer: If your order hasn't arrived within the expected delivery window, first check the tracking information in your account. If tracking shows delivered but you didn't receive it, check with neighbors and your local post office. If it's been more than 3 days past the estimated delivery date, contact support for assistance.

question: How do I return an item?
answer: To return an item, go to Orders > Order History, find the order, and click 'Return Item'. Select the items you want to return and the reason. You'll receive a prepaid return shipping label via email. Pack the items securely and drop them off at the designated carrier location.

question: What is your return policy?
answer: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery for most items in their original condition. Items must be unused and in original packaging. Some items like personalized products and final sale items are not eligible for return. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the return.

question: How do I exchange an item?
answer: To exchange an item, initiate a return through Orders > Order History and select 'Exchange' as the reason. Choose the replacement item (size, color, etc.). The exchange will be processed once we receive the returned item. If the new item has a different price, you'll be charged or refunded the difference.

question: When will I receive my refund?
answer: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive and inspect your returned item. The refund will be credited to your original payment method. It may take an additional 3-5 business days for the refund to appear on your statement depending on your bank.

question: I received a damaged item. What should I do?
answer: If you received a damaged item, contact support immediately with your order number and photos of the damage. We'll arrange a free return and send a replacement right away. Damaged items should be reported within 48 hours of delivery for the fastest resolution.

question: How do I contact customer support?
answer: You can reach our support team through: 1) Live chat on our website (available 24/7). 2) Email at support@example.com (response within 24 hours). 3) Phone at 1-800-555-0123 (Mon-Fri 9am-6pm EST). 4) Social media @examplesupport on Twitter/X.

question: What are your business hours?
answer: Our customer support team is available Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM Eastern Time. Live chat is available 24/7 with AI-assisted support outside business hours. Phone support and email responses are handled during business hours only.

question: Is my personal data secure?
answer: Yes, we take data security very seriously. We use industry-standard AES-256 encryption for data at rest and TLS 1.3 for data in transit. We are SOC 2 Type II certified and comply with GDPR and CCPA regulations. We never sell your personal data to third parties.

question: Do you have a mobile app?
answer: Yes, our mobile app is available for both iOS and Android. You can download it from the Apple App Store or Google Play Store by searching for our company name. The app includes all features available on the web platform plus push notifications for order updates.

question: How do I provide feedback or suggestions?
answer: We love hearing from our customers! You can provide feedback through: 1) The feedback form in the app (Help > Send Feedback). 2) Email at feedback@example.com. 3) Our community forum at community.example.com. Feature requests are reviewed by our product team monthly.
